Class DefaultSourceFileRepository

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.io.DefaultSourceFileRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener, SourceFileRepository, Service, ChangeHistoryListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository
public class DefaultSourceFileRepository extends AbstractService implements SourceFileRepository, ChangeHistoryListener, PropertyChangeListener

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
      Description copied from class: AbstractService
      Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known. Services may now start communicating or linking among their configuration partners. The service configuration can be memorized if it has not been passed in by a constructor already. The default implementation does nothing.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Service
      Overrides:
      initialize in class AbstractService
      Parameters:
      cfg - the service configuration this services has been assigned to.

    • addProgressListener

      public void addProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Adds a progress listener for SourceFileRepository.getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(), SourceFileRepository.getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[])and SourceFileRepository.printAll(boolean).
      Specified by:
      addProgressListener in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      l - a progress listener.

      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Removes the given progress listener.
      Specified by:
      removeProgressListener in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:

    • findSourceFile

      public DataLocation findSourceFile(String classname)
      Searches for the location of the source file for the given class.
      Specified by:
      findSourceFile in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      classname - the name of the class for which the source file should be looked up.
      Returns:
      the source file location.

    • getCompilationUnitFromLocation

      protected CompilationUnit getCompilationUnitFromLocation(DataLocation loc) throws ParserException
      Throws:
      ParserException

    • getCompilationUnitFromFile

      public CompilationUnit getCompilationUnitFromFile(String filename) throws ParserException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Retrieves the abstract syntax tree for the compilation unit within the specified file. The service guarantees not to retrieve two different syntax trees for the same location. The given filename may also be absolute - it will then be shortened if a prefix is in the search path, or used to load the file regardless of the search path, otherwise.
      Specified by:
      getCompilationUnitFromFile in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file to look for
      Returns:
      a compilation unit object for that file, or null if there was no unit under this name whatoever.
      Throws:
      ParserException - if something happened while parsing.

    • getCompilationUnitsFromFiles

      public List<CompilationUnit> getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[] filenames) throws ParserException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Calls SourceFileRepository.getCompilationUnitFromFile(String)for all given file names.
      Specified by:
      getCompilationUnitsFromFiles in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      filenames - the names of the files to look for.
      Returns:
      a list of all available compilation units for the given files.
      Throws:
      ParserException - if something happened while parsing.

    • getCompilationUnit

      public CompilationUnit getCompilationUnit(String classname)
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Retrieves the AST for the compilation unit containing the class with the given name. This method will not throw ParserExceptions, but pass these to the system error handler.
      Specified by:
      getCompilationUnit in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      classname - the fully qualified classname of the required class.
      Returns:
      the AST for that class, if sources are available, null otherwise.

    • getCompilationUnits

      public List<CompilationUnit> getCompilationUnits()
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Returns the list of compilation unit in the project. This call may trigger an update.
      Specified by:
      getCompilationUnits in interface SourceFileRepository

    • getKnownCompilationUnits

      public List<CompilationUnit> getKnownCompilationUnits()
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Returns the current list of compilation unit in the repository.
      Specified by:
      getKnownCompilationUnits in interface SourceFileRepository

    • getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath

      public List<CompilationUnit> getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath() throws ParserException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Retrieves all compilation units from the current search path, transitively. This is useful to create a closed world, but assumes that all subdirectories of the search path belong to the project.
      Specified by:
      getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath in interface SourceFileRepository
      Returns:
      the list of all compilation units accessible via the search path.
      Throws:
      ParserException

    • getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath

      public List<CompilationUnit> getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(FilenameFilter filter) throws ParserException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Retrieves compilation units from the current search path, as given by the filter. The algorithm checks all files in all subdirectories, but this can be narrowed down in the filter.
      Specified by:
      getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      filter - a filename filter accepting source files.
      Returns:
      the list of all compilation units obeying the filter and accessible via the search path.
      Throws:
      ParserException

    • isUpToDate

      public boolean isUpToDate(CompilationUnit cu)
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Checks if the given compilation unit is up to date or if it has changed after the last persistant state.
      Specified by:
      isUpToDate in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      cu - a compilation unit.
      Returns:
      true if the compilation unit does not have to be written back.

    • createDataLocation

      protected DataLocation createDataLocation(CompilationUnit cu)

    • print

      public void print(CompilationUnit cu) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Print back the compilation unit to it's data location. If the compilation unit is still at its original location, apply the filename mapper.
      Specified by:
      print in interface SourceFileRepository
      Throws:
      IOException

    • printAll

      public void printAll(boolean always) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: SourceFileRepository
      Print back all compilation units to their data locations. Can be used to print all units, or only those that are not up to date.
      Specified by:
      printAll in interface SourceFileRepository
      Parameters:
      always - flag to indicate whether all units should be written back ( true), or only these which are not up to date ( false).
      Throws:
      IOException
      See Also:
      • SourceFileRepository.print(CompilationUnit)
      • SourceFileRepository.isUpToDate(CompilationUnit)

    • cleanUp

      public void cleanUp()
      Deletes all superfluous (renamed, detached) compilation unit files. Does not remove source files from other sources.
      Specified by:
      cleanUp in interface SourceFileRepository

    • information

      public String information()
